questionHtml: Using an AD/AS diagram, explain how an increase in oil prices “could worsen inflationary pressures” (paragraph [4]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

For AD/AS, the vertical axis may be price level or average price level or general price level. The horizontal axis may be real output, real national output, real national income, or real GDP. Any abbreviation is acceptable. A title is not necessary.

meta.title: Using an AD/AS diagram, explain how an increase in oil prices “could worsen inflationary pressures” (paragraph [4]).
